author: Ruofeng Yang (杨若峰), Shanghai Jiao Tong University
reviewer: codex gpt-5.5 xhigh, fresh thread per run (never codex-reply)

history.issue: <details><summary>Key safety features</summary> inner markdown bullets emitted as literal text
history.fix: Added _render_html_block() in render_html.py — <details> blocks recursively parse inner content as Markdown (GFM convention)

history.issue: Added privacy + byline pass — verified no absolute /Users/... path leaks, author byline renders with CJK characters intact
history.fix: Renderer: added _repo_relative() helper for display path; added --author flag + {{BYLINE_BLOCK}} placeholder; templates render byline between subtitle and meta strip

history.issue: Expanded doc with 6 new workflow detail sections; FAIL because W2 lacked closing callout while other workflows had one; minor 'Six Workflows' vs 7 entries label inconsistency
history.fix: Added W2 closing 🔁 callout; renamed section heading to 'The Workflows'

history.issue: W2's new 🔁 callout rendered as plain <blockquote> not styled callout (emoji not in callout-prefix map); residual 'Six workflows'/'六大工作流' wording in TL;DR and CN section
history.fix: Added 🔁 (+ 🌱 / 📚 / 🧬) to _CALLOUT_PREFIX_MAP in render_html.py; updated TL;DR + CN section to 'Seven workflows (W1/W1.5/W2/W3/W4/W5/W6)' / '七条工作流'

history.issue: One residual 'across all six workflows' phrase in Research Wiki bullet

summary: Seven-round review: WARN (details MD) → PASS → PASS (privacy+byline) → FAIL (W2 missing closing callout) → WARN (🔁 not styled, count drift) → WARN (one stale count phrase) → PASS. 13 checks pass on run 7. Each round generated a renderer or content fix; full audit trail above. Final source SHA256 612bea09bdbe.
